feed.title: AO3 - Hal Jordan (Green Lantern)/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Hal Jordan (Green Lantern)/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Soulmates, secrets, and kisses
entry.summary:
Author: rie_rotisse

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 115,529Chapters: 19/25Kudos: 1,613

Summary: In this world where almost everyone is born with a soulmark that writes the first sentence your soulmate says to you, many, many have expected Damian's soulmark to be something… fancy, gaudy, and pretentious, even.But then again, nothing is crueler than fate and love, after all.Damian was born with a soulmark on his left chest, right on his heart, written in the colour of gold (of course, it is gold).The soulmark reads.[Hey, that's my chips!]Yes.What an anti-climax. A disappointment, even. [Rating has been changed to avoid spoilers and stuff]

entry.title: Oh my god I have a crush on Batman.
entry.summary:
Author: SeekerOfMischief

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,338Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 22

Summary: Squeal to my other work “Five Hundred Dollars” but can still definitely be read a standalone. I swallowed, forcing some confidence back into my system. “How about you help me with another dare?” “Mhm. Depends.” “A dance,” I said. “Can’t afford to lose.” Bruce hummed thoughtfully, I could practically feel his gaze dragging slowly over me in a way that absolutely should not have been legal.

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,210Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 7,851

Summary: After a mission, the Justice League talk about celebrities and end up slut shaming Bruce Wayne, not knowing Batman is Bruce, and is sitting five feet away from them.Bruce begins to self-destruct.

entry.title: Total lack of recall
entry.summary:
Author: BoredomBeckons

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,210Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 757

Summary: In the early days of the Justice League the team are unsure if they can trust Batman without knowing his identity. A device borrowed from the Lanterns allow them to ease their doubts without invading his privacy.The user will enter a non-corporeal state for seven days so they can follow their target, see and hear everything they do. When it ends they will forget everything they saw, but whatever opinion they form in that time will remain afterwards. If they see them being kind, they will emerge with a good opinion of them. If they see them being cruel, they will emerge with a poor opinion.The last thing Hal expected was to come out of using the device with a crush.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Sweet Nothings by T*ylor Swift
entry.summary:
Author: PumpkinWritesFandom

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,873Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 71

Summary: Bruce was no stranger to being degraded in a way that great but terrible people were degraded. It was a joke. It really shouldn't have meant anything. Meanwhile, Hal cannot stand the idea of his love being thought of as worth less than the perfectly good and perfectly beautiful man he had chosen to deserve it. He tells Bruce that much. [based on a Tumblr ask - seen at the end of the fic]

entry.title: Drunk And Driven By A Devils Hunger
entry.summary:
Author: even_atlas

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,026Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 60

Summary: “You did everything you could,” Bruce says quietly, taking one of Hal’s hands and inspecting his wrist. It’s red and chafed, definitely going to bruise. Bruce kisses the skin, laying his arm back down between them and stroking at Hal’s hair. “There was nothing you could have done. Nothing I could have done, if it were me. Hal. It was not your fault, baby.”

entry.title: Emerald Rain
entry.summary:
Author: StarSapphireBruce

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,752Chapters: 10/33Kudos: 106

Summary: He was prepared to lead the world’s greatest heroes. He wasn’t prepared for Hal Jordan.From the moment Bruce Wayne watched Gotham be gifted the most beautiful thing the city had ever seen, he realized leadership was never supposed to feel like this……like wanting someone he couldn’t afford to want.

entry.title: Darkness, Imprisoning Me (All That I See, Absolute Horror)
entry.summary:
Author: Radiioblabla

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,461Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 49

Summary: If the nightmares weren’t bad before, they certainly are now; every time he closes his eyes, even for a mere amount of seconds, it’s almost like he can feel the air gradually thinning as the phantom weight of dirt threatens to suffocate him right there and right then, just like it had before.  But that isn’t even the worst of it. OR after the events of JL:Doom, Bruce disappears into his cave, unable to fight the dark memories plaguing his mind and the deep guilt that consumes him. Luckily Hal is there to pull him out of this dark place and clarifies some things. (Watching the movie isn’t essential in order to understand this, but spoiler warning in case you haven’t seen it)

entry.title: To cage a star
entry.summary:
Author: rie_rotisse

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 137,304Chapters: 38/64Kudos: 996

Summary: "Excuse me, um... I need to find someone, would you- would you mind helping me?"The lady who is asked is an old woman at a bus stop, with a warm expression on her face. "Yes, dear, who are you looking for?" "Um..." The little girl in the pale green dress reaches for her small purse and pulls out a carefully kept piece of paper to give the old lady. "His name is written on the back..." "And who may this person be to you, dear?" "My dad... Mom said Mr. Bruce Wayne is my dad."

entry.title: Gotham is the worst
entry.summary:
Author: Frey_S

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 108,126Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 966

Summary: On top of Hal's list of things he hates are three things: charity galas, Gotham and Batman. So of course he ends up dealing with all of those in one night, even if he doesn't technically know he ends up sleeping with that last one. He's never letting Carol drag him to rich people events ever again. In which Hal dates Bruce Wayne. Tells him he's Green Lantern. Breaks up with him. And then sort of dates Batman without knowing that he is in fact sleeping with Bruce Wayne again.

entry.title: one seat left
entry.summary:
Author: highvball

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,162Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 263

Summary: “I was sitting there.” Hal lifted his head enough to squint at the spot Bruce was clearly no longer occupying. “Well, You're not in it.” “I stepped away.” Bruce’s voice was dangerously flat. “I was gone for less than ten minutes.” “Ten minutes is a lifetime in space battles, Spooky. You know what? I don’t care. I just flew, like, seventeen light-years and mediated an alien war. My spine is killing me. Find another seat.” “There is no other seat.” “There’s a whole room of—" Hal looked around. For the first time, his sleep-deprived brain actually registered the designs. “Oh.” “Move.” “No.” “Lantern.” “Nope. Nope nope nope.” or the one where a furniture mishap leaves exactly one good seat in the Watchtower lounge, Hal won't give it up, Bruce won't back down, and somewhere in three weeks of stubborn proximity, they both stop wanting the space and start wanting each other.

entry.title: I admit I've had my doubts (but I wanted to be let in, not out)
entry.summary:
Author: kcft

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,301Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 209

Summary: Oliver cleared his throat. “Listen Hal, everytime we hangout, you bring up Batman one way or another,”“No I don’t–”“Let me finish,” Oliver waved his hand at Hal dismissively, making him cross his arms. Oliver was wrong, he thought with annoyance, he didn't always bring Spooky up.“You're coming off as a little… Obsessed,” Oliver said, Barry nodding along.Hal’s eye twitched. He was going to kill Oliver, he decided. And Barry for agreeing.“Me? Obsessed? With him?” Hal laughed. Oliver and Barry sunk into the couch, knowing this was about to turn into another one of Hal’s rants that they have been victim to before.
